title: Reuse-metrics tracking (downloads/queries)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Reuse metrics (dataset downloads / explorer queries) are tracked without collecting PII or accounts to evidence outcomes.
objective: Track and report reuse metrics (downloads/queries) without PII or accounts, documenting the methodology.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuse metrics (dataset downloads / explorer queries) tracked without collecting PII or accounts.
Metrics reported per release; methodology documented.
output: docs/reuse-metrics.md tracking reuse metrics + methodology, committed via PR.
